programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - Cowboy Up: Cowboys need brawn and brains, so the remaining 11 contestants are tested on both. First, they guess the cost of common ranch items then they endure a grueling overnight challenge guarding a herd of cattle. Host Trace Adkins eliminates two cowboys.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Joe Walker: Humble Hero: Joe Walker doesn't head west to seek fame and fortune, but his trailblazing explorations across the uncharted frontier usher in a golden age of expansion and settlement that help create the United States as we know them today.

programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Big Deal: The guys are back in the saddle on The Cowboy Way! Their dreams of making it big have finally arrived with a million-dollar business opportunity, but only if they can come up with half the cash. While the cowboys struggle with how to raise the money, Bubba is torn if he should ask his father-in-law for help. Booger teaches Matthew to be a real cowboy and gives him his first pony! But when Jaclyn misses this big milestone, she questions if her demanding job is keeping her from her family. And finally, Cody's mission to teach kids about the importance of ranching leads him to take on the Cattlemen's Association. How far will he go to make his point?

programme.title: Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: A homesteading family in 1867 Wyoming faces a crisis when the husband is killed and the wife must decide whether to remain or take her son and daughter back East.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Metal Spurs, Hiking Boots, Backpacks: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In Llano, Texas, Jill spends time with Charles Wendt, a metal worker who recruits her how to help make a custom pair of traditional cowboy spurs. In Felton, California, Jill steps into complete comfort when she meets Kevin Leahy who makes custom hiking boots that perfectly fit each customer's foot. Finally, in Portland, Oregon, Jill meets the Martinez family from Mexico that makes functional as well as fashionable canvas and leather backpacks from all-American materials.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - The Ultimate Cowboy: Bigger in Texas: Season two of Ultimate Cowboy Showdown kicks off with the arrival of fourteen real-life cowboys to the sprawling Texas ranch where they'll call home until only one remains. As they set up camp in the sweltering heat, they make their introductions and size up the competition. While getting better acquainted, personalities clash, and alliances form. In the first of many challenges, the cowboys work in teams to sort gold-tagged cattle from a mixed herd. When miscommunication affects a team's performance, they have to answer to Trace. After consulting with two expert judges, Trace eliminates the team member who didn't pull their weight. As the eliminated contestant hits the trail, the remaining thirteen breathe a sigh of relief and prepare for the next challenge.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - Lines in the Sand: The thirteen remaining cowboys face their first immunity challenge that tests their individual skills. The contestants race to score the fastest time in barrel racing and calf roping. While most cowboys impress Trace and the judges, only one will be safe from the next elimination. For the team challenge, the cowboys take on a group of untrained horses that they have to break, saddle, and ride. In the end, it all comes down to strategy, and the team that thinks ahead takes the win. After a few choice words, teammates lock horns, determined to out-cowboy the other. When an unexpected cowboy heads home, the rest of the contestants realize every move they make counts in this competition.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The story of Team Winchester shooters Zach Kienbaum and Desirae Edmunds is told. Zach and Desi discuss how they got started in the shooting sports and how important coaching has become to both of them. They also talk shooting tips. Theo Ribbs breaks down the shotgun sports while Chris Keefer, Casey Keefer, Paul Sawyer, Nikki Boxler and Gabe Adair have a friendly sporting clays competition.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The Pacific Northwest does not have the easiest conditions to train in for this shooting sports team. For this Seattle-based SST Ravens, this skeet and trap team finds that the challenging weather they train in comes in handy when competing. Also: Competition shooting tips form pro shooter Theo Ribbs.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Every spring brings a new opportunity to take a step forward & recall the memories of seasons past. World War II Veteran and retired Judge Arden Hill has spent most of his life chasing turkeys in the hills of Tennessee. Now in his 90's, Arden doesn't let age stand in the way of his love for spring turkey hunting. Also: patterning turkey shotguns and hunting spring gobblers.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Winchester introduces the Shoot United brand aimed at offering useful information and tips to the millions of new shooters entering the shooting sports. New York native and Midland University competitive shotgun shooter Amy Cawley and her journey as a student-athlete is followed. Also: Theo Ribbs gives shooting tips for competition and Foster Bartholow reviews Winchester AA Diamond Grade.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Charles Rodney's relationship with his hunting dogs, passion for field-to-table living and connection to the land make his love for chasing rabbits contagious while the heritage of Winchester's small game ammunition makes this beloved pastime accessible for generations to come. Also: a Model 42 collection for the ages and hunting Kansas coyotes with the Keefer Brothers.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Deer season — the sights, the sounds and the smells stick with you. It's about remembering those who came before us and setting the right example for those who look up to us. It's about protecting the tradition, so they always have something to look forward to. When communities come together, we see the real reason for this special time of year.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Louisiana's Wild Food & Award-Winning Cuisine | Hog Hunting, Swamp Fishing & MORE
programme.desc: In Episode 2: New Orleans, Josh links up with Mason Hereford (owner of award-winning sandwich shop Turkey and the Wolf) and then hits the road for some epic hog hunting, swamp fishing, crawfish and oyster harvesting, and exploring Louisiana's only water buffalo dairy farm. It all culminates in one incredible feast featuring unique regional dishes prepared by Mason with the help of some local friends.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats
programme.desc: In Episode 3, Josh starts off in the Twin Cities where he meets up with Yia Vang, an award-winning Hmong chef and restaurant owner, bringing his family's traditions and flavors to the American Midwest. As Josh heads up north to Duluth and the boundary waters, he'll meet plenty of farmers and foragers—harvesting mushrooms, wild rice, and catching a few fish (and waves) along the way. It all wraps up with an epic feast hosted by Yia back in the cities.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE
programme.desc: New. York. City. That's where our host Josh Rosen kicks off his journey in Episode 4—and where he lived for 16 years and started up the surf-centric apparel brand, Saturdays NYC. Back in his old stomping grounds, Josh first meets up with the award-winning chef and Mumbai native, Chintan Pandya, currently blowing up the New York food scene with his unapologetic and authentic Indian cuisine (pro tip: try the goat brains). Next, Josh travels through the boroughs, heads upstate, and along the coast to source local ingredients—from sake brewers and pig farmers to catching fresh lobster just 100 miles from Wall Street. As always the adventure will end with a feast, right back in Chintan's kitchen.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "The ULTIMATE Ireland Food Road Trip | Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats
programme.desc: For DIRT's first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland. From long-held traditions to the modern-day artisanal movement, he unearthed the multicultural goldmine between the highlands and the Wild Atlantic Way—with stops for surfing, a seaweed bath, and a couple holes of golf spectated by free-range goats, of course. Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It's all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT's past adventures.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.desc: No matter what the town needs, Mila and her magical pet, Morphle will work together to save the day.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids.

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: The Royal Blacksmiths
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Green Ninja
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd - but realize they have to work together in their attempt to rescue Lloyd from the snakes inside the unstable Fire Temple that is built on a volcano.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels meet a little worm and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee is blowing up balloons and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee is stroking Enid the cat and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels help in the garden and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels meet Duggee's friend Eugene and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee solves a mystery./Duggee makes a snazzy Poncho and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Dinopaws
programme.desc: Dinopaws Tony finds a bone but another dino takes it from him/Bob can't join in with Gwen and Tony's game

programme.title: Dinopaws
programme.desc: Dinopaws Bob loses Gwen in a canyon that makes their voices echo/Tony runs into a cave where a scary thing lives.

programme.title: Dinopaws
programme.desc: Dinopaws Bob gets cold playing/The Dinopaws decide to chase the sun to stop the day from ending.

programme.title: Dinopaws
programme.desc: Dinopaws The Dinopaws are really snoozy/The Dinopaws invent the best game ever - bigging and rounding.

programme.title: Dinopaws
programme.desc: Dinopaws The Dinopaws invent a new game called Look-at-Me./The Dinopaws find something that is round and pointy.

programme.title: Dinopaws
programme.desc: Dinopaws The Dinopaws are hungry/Gwen, Bob and Tony bounce very high from some mushrooms and get stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Berry Big Tale-Teller
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story. Sweet is thrilled when everyone applauds her, even Sour, who is impressed by her contribution and proud of her sister.

programme.title: Foods that start with Q
programme.desc: Can you name a food that starts with Q? Avery makes Quiche with Chef Jean-Jacques Texier. Lily visits a sheep farm to find out about a creamy, little known cheese called Quark. Back in the kitchen, they take on Matt's Quirky Quesadilla challenge.

programme.title: Foods for The Brain
programme.desc: Lily knows the smartest way to start the day is with a good breakfast, and meets Chef Donna Dooher to make Green Eggs and Ham. Avery visits a centre that researches fish. Matt keeps score as the two face-off with blueberry and strawberry deserts that help build brain power.

programme.title: The Itchy Tag
programme.desc: At school, Sid and his friends explore and learn about the different textures around them: smooth, soft, bumpy and itchy...like his shirt tag!

programme.title: What's That Smell?
programme.desc: But the yummy scent is quickly taken over by a different smell when baby brother Zeke and his stinky diaper enter Sid's room. At school, Sid learns how smells travel through the air and arrive inside the nose.

programme.title: The Princess and the Dragon
programme.desc: When a 7 year old princess gets transported to a magical world where she befriends a Dragon, she sets to find out a secret mirror that can help her reconnect with her mother.

programme.title: Rabbit School
programme.desc: A rabbit gets lost in a strange land where he'll need to learn the secrets of Easter magic to save the Rabbit School from being taken over by a gang of evil foxes.

programme.title: Blippi Visits Kennedy Space Center
programme.desc: Blippi takes a trip to the Kennedy Space Center, immersing himself in the fascinating world of space exploration and gaining knowledge about the vast expanse beyond our planet!

programme.title: The Berry Bitty Great Race
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling "Tall Tales." So Apple tells her thrilling adventure of a wild road rally she entered, only to surprise the girls by proving the story is actually true.

programme.title: The Berry Best Taste Test
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball. A madcap chase ensues as Apple tries to stop the airmail postal bees from delivering the cake.

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: JillianTubeHD
programme.desc: Join YouTube star, JillianTubeHD, as she makes everything from delicious desserts to gold, glittery slime!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show
programme.sub-title: Kids Diana Show | Dress Up Delight!
programme.desc: Kid video superstar, Diana, and her brother, Roma, take you along on all their pretend play adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Charlie Freaks Out
programme.desc: CHARLIE FREAKS OUT is about Charlie, who is TOTALLY freaking out about those things she's crazy about! Like Rey from Star Wars, The Rubik's Cube, Minecraft, and even BROCCOLI!

programme.title: Satisfying Video
programme.desc: Here you will find videos of finger family nursery rhymes, Play Doh, Kinetic Sand, Toys

programme.title: Akili and Me
programme.sub-title: Akili and Friends in the Clouds
programme.desc: Akili and her friends wake up on the clouds in Lala Land they enjoy the beautiful view from the top but later become tired and want to go down they learn the magic words, please, thank you, sorry, and help.

programme.title: Problem Solved
programme.desc: Hey! You in the back! Losing participation points because you're teacher can't see you? Don't worry, Jeremy can, and he has the perfect solution!

programme.title: Wow, I Never Knew That!
programme.desc: A whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed with exciting tidbits and fascinating facts that uncover the truths and origins behind the stuff you're already familiar with.

programme.title: The Shadownsters
programme.desc: Solomon and Gretta are ready to get some sleep. When their father switches off the light, Gretta falls asleep and Solomon, very scared, tries to hide under the sheets. Suddenly, he hears a weird noise. Solomon is frightened and calls Pancho, his reliable plush, who comes to life and helps him to discover a terrible monster, a Shadownster.

programme.title: KIDZ BOP Kids
programme.desc: KIDZ BOP, the #1 Music Brand for Kids

programme.title: Bubble Bip
programme.desc: The hilarious adventures of Bubble Bip, a video game hero who slings bubbles at sassy squids, and the zany group of Earth kids he makes friends with.

programme.title: Heroes of Goo Jit Zu: Gooing Under
programme.desc: Thrash is venturing into the ocean to find the source of those strange deep sea Goo signals. The ocean in this area seems to have a Goo-ish green glow that enters Thrash's body and activates his Deep Goo Sea Goo-volution. As he dives deeper, an entire undersea civilization appears in front of him! Temple-like buildings, cobblestone streets, and a magnificent statue of KING HYDRA!

programme.title: Doggyland: Wheels On The Bus / Sharing is Caring / Head Shoulders Knees & Toes / Everybody's Different / Affirmations Part 1 / 5 Little Puppies
programme.desc: Get ready to join Bow Wizzle (played by Snoop Dogg) and a group of high-spirited puppies as they all sing, rap and dance while riding the bus to school!

programme.title: Pins and Nettie: Hedgie Sleepover / Hedgie and the Smell
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie have been invited to a sleepover at their friend's house. They've been excited about it for such a long time but now that the night has arrived, they are apprehensive about sleeping so / Pins and Nettie encounter a snail who is even more shy than they are. Now the wellie is on the other foot and the hedgies must learn how to help their shy friend and make her feel safe and comfortable.

programme.title: Cocomelon: JJ's Animal Time: Animal Dance / Tortoise and the Hare
programme.desc: Get ready to dance with animals and then learn about growing fruits in these entertaining compilations.

programme.title: Little Angel: Ballet Song / Brush Your Teeth Song / Everyone Helps Around The House
programme.desc: Jill has her first ballet class. / It's fun to brush our teeth! Mommy shows Baby John that brushing our teeth is not only a good habit but can also be fun. / Mommy makes a list of chores that have to be done around the house and everyone decides to help out.

programme.title: Cam & Leon: Tight Fight, Lucky Drip
programme.desc: Is it a real donut or a toy donut? Cam and Leon fiddle with a donut! Cam and Leon find a carbonated drink can. Their curiosity leads to a hilarious joy ride. Cam, Leon and a carbonated drink can land

programme.title: Peppa Pig Season 1: Secrets / Flying a Kite
programme.desc: Mummy Pig makes Peppa a special box to put secret things in. Peppa loves secrets. George is sad because Peppa won't tell him what's in the box. When George gets his own secret box, and Peppa can't guess what's inside, she decides she doesn't like secrets as much as she used to. / Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy are flying a kite in the park. Things don't go according to plan and the kite gets tangled in a tree beside a big muddy puddle. Mummy Pig doesn't want George and Peppa to get muddy but when Daddy Pig falls into the puddle, and everyone gets splashed, there's no harm in having a good jump around in the mud.

programme.title: Pajanimals: Not-So-Great Outdoors / Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: After a fun day outside, the Pajanimals are surprised to learn that Squacky didn't have a good time and has decided that he's never going outside again! / As the Pajanimals get ready for a big trip, they notice that Sweet Pea Sue is packing almost everything she owns because if she has to leave her home, she's taking it with her.

programme.title: Pins and Nettie: Hedgie Sleepover / Hedgie and the Smell
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie have been invited to a sleepover at their friend's house. They've been excited about it for such a long time but now that the night has arrived, they are apprehensive about sleeping so / Pins and Nettie encounter a snail who is even more shy than they are. Now the wellie is on the other foot and the hedgies must learn how to help their shy friend and make her feel safe and comfortable.

programme.title: Road Rangers: Who Are You Going To Call / Sawyer's Folly / Road Ranger had a Farm
programme.desc: Whenever there is any trouble that one can't handle, the Road Rangers be come the savior. They team up to control and manage the critical situations around the car cartoon town. Have fun while watching this super cool cartoon show for kids./ Sawyer, the tow truck, is on a holiday watch how he enjoys his holiday while the rest of his friends work. Instead of helping his friends in need he continuous to enjoy his mini vacation. Enjoy as Sawyer learns a huge lesson on being selfish. / It's so interesting to know that Road Rangers too had a farm with so many cute animals around. Watch this lovely animal song for kids and babies and have a wonderful time singing along to our version of the old classic kids songs like Abc, numbers, colors, shapes, phonics and more with their favorite friends.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Takes a Stand
programme.desc: Arthur thinks Mrs. MacGrady is being treated unfairly, and receives some guidance from special guest congressman John Lewis.

programme.title: Gaby Time: Catching The Bus with Miss Gaby / Making Friends with Miss Gaby / Learn Crosswalk Safety with Miss Gaby / Missing Your Pet with Ms. Gaby
programme.desc: Join Miss Gaby in her interactive play-along adventures. Play along while learning about things like going to school and catching the school bus from a real teacher, Miss Gaby! This fun, educational, and interactive videos feature Miss Gaby helping children and families learn about going to school in a way your kids will LOVE! / Making Friends with Miss Gaby / Join Miss Gaby in her interactive play-along adventures. Play along while learning about crosswalk safety from a real teacher, Miss Gaby! This fun, educational, and interactive video features Miss Gaby helping children and families understand the safest way to cross the street at a crosswalk. / Ms. Gaby is at school and missing her friend Doug The Cat. Join her for some sing-a-long fun as she daydreams of all the crazy things Doug the Cat gets up to while she's away at school!

programme.title: Dive Olly Dive: Space Monkey From Mars
programme.desc: Beth and Olly hear funny noises, but rather than investigating the truth, they assume they have been invaded by aliens from the lost oceans of Mars.

programme.title: Chloe's Closet: Don't Fall A Sheep
programme.desc: Chloe and the kids have to look after a flock of mischievous sheep who keep escaping!

programme.title: Pom Pom and Friends: Welcome Pom Pom / Pom Pom Goes to Rainbow Hill / Pom Pom the Hero
programme.desc: When Shawn and Annie aren't able to go out and play due to rainy weather the two wishes for a hero who can help their friends on rainy days.

programme.title: Numberblocks: Square Club / Seventeen
programme.desc: Things get totally out of hand at a Square Club meeting - until a certain someone arrives to save the day. / Meet the artist known as Seventeen, who likes to paint 17 of everything.

programme.title: Balloopo: Puffer Pop/ Fruit Rain
programme.desc: PUFFER POP Paru catches a Puffer Pop fish who pops things when no one is looking. FRUIT RAIN After trying to out-do Poppys planting skills, Paru accidentally drops all his fruit seeds on top of a cloud

programme.title: Cry Babies Magic Tears: The Pear Monster / The Little Worm
programme.desc: Ella is this month's Best Harvester and to celebrate she invites all of her friends for a super smoothie. All the Cry Babies are on their way to the beach when Ella, along with Nana, take several smoothies and piles them in her arms, but... when she tries to walk, loses balance and all the smoothies fall on her! One hits her in the eye leaving a smoothie-shaped bruise. When the other Cry Babies arrive to the beach, they ask what has happened to her eye. Ella gets nervous and starts lying telling the story of how the Pear Monster has tried to attack her but she knew how to scare it. Will the rest of the Cry Babies believe this story or maybe someone might have witnessed what really happened? Don't miss this new episode of Cry Babies in English and find out the end of this magic story! / The Cry Babies Tutti Frutti's are collecting apples when, suddenly, they find a worm in one of them. The babies want the worm to leave the piece of fruit, but it hypnotises Angie and makes her believe that she now has to live in the apple. The other Cry Babies have no idea what is going on: Angie's behaviour is really strange and she is always together with the worm. When the other Cry Babies realise the worm is hypnotising their friend, Angie explains that the family of Gusi, the worm, need a home. Will the Cry Babies help Angie and her new friend the worm? Don't miss this new episode of Cry Babies in English and find out the end of this magic story!

programme.title: Lellobee City Farm: The Growing Song / Bingo / Ella Ella Yes Mailman / Rain Rain Go Away / Painting the Barn Song
programme.desc: Let's celebrate everything that grows with the Growing Song! Have you ever noticed that everything is changing? Watch the different seasons of the year and revisit plants, animals, children, and buildings in the farm and city to see how they've grown. / Let's welcome our new farm friend Bingo the cat! A stray cat called Bingo is found by Ella and Mei outside of the farm. Mei calls the animal rescue center who sends Sami the Vet to check the cat over. Ella and Mei adopt Bingo and invite her to live on the farm. It's great to make new friends! / Mailman Marcus is delivering mail to Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Rishi and Izzy are all excited to see what deliveries he has for them - Ella gets a camera, Risihi gets a ball and Izzy gets a brand new plush toy! Just as Mei thinks that she doesn't have any mail, she gets a photo delivered by a drone. / Ella meets Frogalina (a frog ballerina) who shows her how to enjoy the rain with some splashy ballet dance moves. Inspired, Ella shows Go-Go the cat and Pablo the pig that rain is important, and fun, on Lellobee Farm. / The Boogie Barn needs a new coat of paint. The children and animals all want to help. Mei brings them the paint and they all have fun adding paint and mixing paint to create a multi-coloured Boogie Barn!

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening at Xavier Academy. The day to day goings on of Gerry and the rest of the staff have been completely reversed.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry figures he's a sure thing for the school's Coach of the Year award after his team wins the city championship. Callaghan makes a bombshell announcement. Jimmy is finally graduating and Frank is determined to help him find a career.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: After losing his Xavier Academy job last season over the unfortunate Coach Keenan saga, Gerry finds himself subbing at a tough inner city school, miserable and desperate to get his old job back. Meanwhile, the Xavier staff is concerned about Robert, whose attempt to cultivate a cool new laid back image is misconstrued for a nervous breakdown due to his having been overlooked as Principal Callaghan's successor. At the same time, Trudy's patience is tested when Emma's husband Ted decides to hang out for the day while his wife works.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark fears being forced to play the cello will make him a social pariah. But when his cello is taken by a gang of bullies, Fox begrudgingly comes to his rescue. Meanwhile, Pop and Sister Rose take a stroll down memory lane when it's revealed they used to be an item.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: When Ritche invites himself to a sleepover, Mark scrambles to hide his family's “eccentric” behaviour. Meanwhile, Mike Sr takes a staunch pro-cucumber stance when the new vegetable buys ad time on VOCM radio.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Patrick throw an open mic night to help promote Rose Apothecary, but when Patrick announces he'll be performing, David gets cold feet. Johnny and Alexis begin re-branding the motel, but Stevie is apprehensive, fearing that they're expanding too quickly. Moira accidentally finds out the gender of the Schitts' baby, and tries desperately to keep it a secret.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira throw a family barbecue with the intention of getting to know Patrick a little bit better, as they believe this to be the longest relationship David has ever had. But David is worried about inflicting his family upon Patrick and tries to keep them apart. Meanwhile, Alexis receives a mysterious text from Ted, and with the help of a new friend, decides to investigate.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: After the barbecue fiasco, Stevie takes David to a spa for some much-needed wallowing. Unfortunately, she has chosen a honeymoon package, which just rubs salt in the wound. Johnny steps in at a Jazzagals rehearsal and wows everyone with his skills, but Moira is not fully on board with her husband's new involvement in her social life. Alexis tests out a dating app and goes on a date with a cute local.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David finally returns to work, hoping to get back together with Patrick, but learns that he may have left things too long. Moira discourages Alexis from pitching a singles night event at Town Hall, then accidentally finds herself pitching the idea as her own. Johnny buys Stevie a thank you gift for all of Stevie's hard work at the motel, but Stevie takes it the wrong way.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate intuits Anne's “cry for help” and takes her friend on an important reconnaissance mission. Meanwhile, Jenny reaches the peak of her self-exploration and is left longing for the way things used to be. But after Ian makes a startling discovery, she may be too late. Frankie picks up a curious new hobby when Giselle steps up to become the working parent.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate arrives in Montreal and finally meets her longtime “working mom” role model and mentor Victoria Stromanger. When the real Victoria doesn't totally line up with the version Kate had long admired, Kate's left wondering about the true cost of “having it all." Meanwhile, Anne makes a major decision with the love and support of her husband Lionel. And Jenny attempts to return to her old life with Ian, by bringing back some things he'd rather leave in the past, while Frankie's new hobby leads to disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: It's game day for Kate: the biggest presentation of her career. This make-or-break opportunity unfortunately collides with a crisis at home. Now Kate is faced with the ultimate choice: career or motherhood? Meanwhile, Anne's family is united through Alice's school project. Ian calls out Jenny on her erratic behaviour, and forces her to own up to what she really wants. And Frankie attempts to repair the damage she's done to her family and her life.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: The year is 2005 and a young ambitious Kate attends her best friend Anne's wedding, but encounters situations that could change the course of their lives forever.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Have you ever, as an adult, been bullied by a healthcare professional or popular middle school girl? Andrew has. The comedy of Andrew Hobbs encapsulates the bizarre awkwardness of belated maturity and his attempts to appear in control. Andrew will have you rolling with laughter as he twists a narrative of humor and heart from his own life experiences and observations. His comedy has been featured in comedy festivals across the country. He has been perfecting his craft since childhood and throughout adulthood.

programme.title: Day the Earth Stopped, The
programme.desc: Hundreds of massive intergalactic robots appear in all of the major world capitals with an ultimatum: Prove the value of human civilization or be destroyed.

programme.title: Homeward

programme.title: King of the Lost World

programme.title: Mega Piranha

programme.title: Charade

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: The Sleepwalker Killing
programme.desc: A man admits to murder, but his lawyers try to prove that he wasn't awake when it happened. With Hilary Swank.

programme.title: Greenfingers

programme.title: Bloodwork

programme.title: Beyond Redemption

programme.title: Metro

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story

programme.title: Transsiberian
programme.desc: A Transsiberian train journey to Moscow becomes a thrilling chase of deception and murder.

programme.title: Claydream

programme.title: Travis Kelce: Sharp, Sturdy, Swift
programme.desc: Blessed with God-given talent, genes and mentality, Travis Kelce forged his name in the annals of American sporting achievements. As his life takes on another twist in the form of T. Swift, we take a look back at the journey of one of NFL's greats. Directed by Nick Randall.

programme.title: Oscar Nominated "Ninety-five Senses"

programme.title: Feels Good Man

programme.title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood
programme.desc: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out three-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in late February 2008 when icons Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their all-too-brief days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969. Whether they will ever team again is unknown. But with Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood Live From Madison Square Garden fans everywhere are able to experience the sound and the glory of a performance on that famous stage by two of rock's greatest artists.

programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny

programme.title: A Zamboni?

programme.title: Did You Know ... ?
programme.desc: Are you as smart as these brilliant minds? Find out. You may learn a thing or two. 1) The physics of the "hardest move" in ballet - Arleen Sugano 2) If you're scared of snakes, watch this | Andrew Whitworth 3) Why do we eat popcorn at the movies? | Andrew Smith 4) How do pain relievers work? - George Zaidan 5) The infamous overpopulation bet: Simon vs. Ehrlich | Soraya Field Fiorio 6) The myth of Ireland's two greatest warriors | Iseult Gillespie 7) How did feathers evolve? - Carl Zimmer 8) The method that can "prove" almost anything | James A. Smith 9) Why bats don't get sick | Arinjay Banerjee 10) Why is it so hard to cure the common cold? | TED-Ed 11) The myth of Jason, Medea, and the Golden Fleece | Iseult Gillespie

programme.title: The Latest in Ideas
programme.desc: New, fresh ideas straight from the brightest minds of our time. 1) My epic journey becoming the fastest person to paddle around Australia | Bonnie Hancock 2) How to choose clothes for longevity, not the landfill | Diarra Bousso 3) How to prevent political corruption | Stephanie Honchell Smith 4) Can we hack photosynthesis to feed the world? | Steve Long 5) Does math have a major flaw? | Jacqueline Doan and Alex Kazachek 6) An election redesign to restore trust in US democracy | Tiana Epps-Johnson

programme.title: Food for Thought
programme.desc: What can compare to the pleasures of the palate? Chefs, food scientists and passionate entrepreneurs celebrate all things edible -- and explore what's next for the future of food. (1) How sugar affects the brain - Nicole Avena (2) A guerrilla gardener in South Central LA | Ron Finley (3) Teach every child about food | Jamie Oliver (4) Got millet? How marketing could improve the lives of African farmers | Zoë Karl-Waithaka (5) Will the ocean ever run out of fish? - Ayana Elizabeth Johnson and Jennifer Jacquet

programme.title: Procrastination Station
programme.desc: Fascinating ideas for when you should probably be doing something else. 1) How to control someone else's arm with your brain | Greg Gage 2) How webtoons are changing movies and TV | Hyeonmi Kim 3) Da Vinci's Vitruvian Man of math - James Earle 4) Mind-blowing, magnified portraits of insects | Levon Biss 5) The architectural wonder of impermanent cities | Rahul Mehrotra 6) Smelfies, and other experiments in synthetic biology | Ani Liu 7) How do oysters make pearls? | Rob Ulrich
